title: urostigma fagineum
intro: Urostigma fagineum is a plant species belonging to the family Urostigmataceae, commonly known for its potential medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in India, for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Urostigma fagineum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Urostigma fagineum can be made in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
